overall.description: First-person nighttime footage of a person walking through an open grassy field or meadow using a flashlight. The warm beam illuminates the dirt path ahead while dark tree lines frame both sides of the field against the night sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the grassy field using a flashlight to illuminate the dirt path ahead, with hand occasionally visible on the left edge of frame

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through the grass, illuminated by the flashlight
tall grass covering the open field on the left side of the path
tall grass covering the open field on the right side of the path
dark silhouette of trees forming the left boundary of the field
dark silhouette of trees forming the right boundary of the field
dark night sky visible above the tree line
hand or arm visible on the left edge holding the flashlight in early frames

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward through a wide-open grassy field at night, following a narrow dirt path illuminated by a warm flashlight beam. Dark tree lines frame both sides of the field against the night sky, with tall grass visible in the peripheral illumination. The hand holding the flashlight occasionally appears on the left edge of the frame as the walker progresses along the trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a dark, open meadow illuminated by a single handheld light source. It begins with the camera advancing steadily along a narrow dirt path, where a warm flashlight beam cuts through the nighttime gloom. As the walker progresses, the light catches the texture of tall grass in the periphery while the hand holding the torch occasionally enters the left edge of the frame. The scene then maintains this steady pace, keeping the path centered as dark, imposing tree lines frame the horizon against the night sky.
